rulings.Case Title: JAIRUS GAUDARIO VS. MARK RACINES
rulings.Calendar Matter: Renotice Of Pltf'S Motion, Petition To Coordinate Issues That Had Arised From Proceedings In Superior Court Case #413930 Of Common Of Issues Of Facts & Laws To The Pleadings In Superior Court
rulings.Rulings: O F F C A L E N D A R, PROOF OF SERVICE DEFECTIVE 1) SIGNED BY PRO PER PLAINTIFF (I.E. PARTY TO THE ACTION). 2) PROOF OF SERVICE IS FOR SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM, NOT FOR THIS MOTION. (REQ/302/JU)
